Step 2:  An existing BTMS agent with credentials "<username >" and "<password>" should be entered respectively in username and password fields.

Step 6: Once the data is returned click on the row.

Match vendors field should already be set as TNX

if values are not matching then click on Edit button and update the Enable Digital Matching Engine field values to YES.

Step 12:  Once user gets switched, select Hover the mouse on HOME tab and select sub tab OFFICE CONFIG.
Step 13: Click on POST AUTOMATION button.
Step 14: Once user is on post automation page click on search field and enter value as BONDED CHEMICAL

4. Click on Customer profile.

20. Enter the "Latest Time" (Eg. 10:00)

53 Click on the plus icon and search the load
54. Click the load and Ensure the load is Matched and check the offer rate match with the offer rate entered at step 33 .

A message is displayed relating "A carrier contact for auto accept must be selected"

The load is saved and is displayed in view mode
- The Offer Rate field is populated with the rate entered
- The Expiration Date field is auto populated with the value of the origin pick deadline date

- Avg Rate accurately updated

- Bid History accurately updated

- Email notification sent to the agent(s) selected for the Email for Notifications field on the load

- Vendor Statuses:
- BTMS CANCELLED
- TNX BOOKED
